_comment: schema: id (string), title (string), description (string), objective { kind: 'catch'|'talk'|'walk', target (string - fish name, npc id, 'any' or biome name like 'Desert'), count (int, defaults 1) }, reward { valu (u64) }. quests auto-start. on completion, valu is granted and the quest is marked done.

title: First Cast
description: Catch any common carp. They're forgiving.

title: Fill the Basket
description: Catch three bluegill for the inn's cook.

title: Stretch Your Legs
description: Take a long walk - 200 steps in any direction.

title: Desert Trek
description: Walk 80 steps through the Desert biome.
